title: T-019 — UI: FA list page (fa_list prototype) — page + table + filters
prompt:
# T-019 — FA list page UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.5 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md fa_list
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:177-297 (fa_list)

## Goal
Server Component page /(npd)/fa rendering the FA list table with shadcn primitives matching prototype 1:1: dept filter chips, show-closed toggle, status_overall pill, sortable columns, row click → /(npd)/fa/[productCode].

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/page.tsx (RSC) reads listFaByDept via Drizzle. Renders DataTable (shadcn Table primitives) with columns (Product_Code, Product_Name, Pack_Size, Status_Overall pill, Days_To_Launch, Built indicator). Filters URL-persisted (?dept, ?showClosed, ?sort). Empty/loading/error states. Translation notes: window.NPD_FAS replaced by Drizzle query; openModal pattern replaced by URL search params.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/_components/fa-list-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/_components/__tests__/fa-list-table.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:177-297 (fa_list), then it has the same column order (Product_Code, Product_Name, Pack_Size, Status, Days_To_Launch, Built), the same dept filter chips region above the table, and uses shadcn Table+Badge+Button primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + checklist in pipeline_inputs.details (structural+visual+interaction parity)
2. Given URL ?dept=mrp, when page renders, then list filters to FAs where MRP dept has missing data
3. Given URL ?showClosed=true, when page renders, then closed FAs are included

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting column count + dept chips region + shadcn primitive presence per parity AC
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test fa-list-table'

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML <select> instead of shadcn Select
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not bypass listFaByDept (no direct DB query in component)

pipeline_inputs.description: FA list page (RSC) + DataTable component matching fa_list prototype with dept filter chips, show-closed toggle, status pill.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity checklist (must verify all): (1) same 6 columns in same order; (2) dept filter chip region above table using Toggle/Badge primitives; (3) status pill via shadcn Badge variants; (4) shadcn Table for body; (5) URL persistence for ?dept, ?showClosed, ?sort; (6) row click navigates with prefetch. Translation notes from prototype-index-npd.json fa_list entry: window.NPD_FAS → Drizzle listFaByDept; openModal pattern → URL search params parsed in root client component.
